'''bagulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabine|arabine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabine|arabine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bagulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || bægilith || bægilij || bægilish || bægili
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || baguguluth || baguguluj || bagugulush || bagugulu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || baguluth || baguluj || bagulush || bagulu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || baguflufth || baguflufj || baguflufsh || bagufluf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || baguluthu || baguluju || bagulushu || baguluku
|-
| [[Patient]] || baguluth || baguluj || bagulush || bagulu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || baguluthul || bagulujul || bagulushul || bagulukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || baguluuthuthu || baguluujuju || baguluushushu || baguluuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || baguluthun || bagulujun || bagulushun || bagulukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || baguluthuoro || bagulujuoro || bagulushuoro || bagulukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
